description_long: This is a stone bridge with a robust, rectangular deck supported by a series of prominent arches beneath. The bridge features solid, block-like construction with visible stonework and a raised, decorative circular pattern at the center of the walkway. The sides are lined with ornate railings composed of repeating geometric cutouts and upright posts, giving the structure a classical and slightly gothic appearance. The arches below provide both structural support and visual interest, while the deck is wide enough to accommodate pedestrian or light vehicular traffic. The surface appears weathered and matte, consistent with aged stone. No lighting fixtures or additional decorative elements are visible beyond the railings and arches.
description: A stone bridge with ornate geometric railings and supporting arches, featuring a wide, weathered deck and classical design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the solid stone entry, raised walkway, and the start of the ornate railings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the series of supporting arches and the full length of the decorative railings.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the stone entry and raised walkway visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the supporting arches and the detailed railing design.
attribute_railing_design: stone balustrade with repeating geometric cutouts and upright posts
